title: Fun Activities and Rest During Class Breaks
passage:
Do you have a rest between classes? And what do you usually do during the rest time? Let me tell you what we do during the rest.

We have a twenty-minute rest between classes. Look! Most of us are playing during the rest time. Some students are on the playground. They are having a basketball game. Oh! A boy is running with a ball. And another boy is trying to stop him. They are so cool. And there are some girls watching the game. Some students are in the classroom. They are talking. A few of them are reading or doing homework. Look! A girl is looking at the birds in a tree in front of the classroom. She must be thinking of something interesting because she is smiling.

What are the teachers doing? Do you know? Some of them are working in the office, and some are talking with students. Everyone is busy with his or her things. We are all busy and happy!

questions.prompt: How long is the rest between classes?

options: Working in the office or talking with students.
Watching birds in front of the classroom.

questions.prompt: What do you usually do during the rest time? Write 20 words or more.

blocks.text: I usually chat with my best friends or walk around the school playground during the rest time.
Because this helps me relax my brain and eyes after a long study session.
It keeps me energetic and ready for the next challenging class.
We have a twenty-minute rest between classes.
A girl is looking at the birds in a tree.
The teachers are working in their offices.
